prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/332-deck.key in Keynote (which has 2 slides). Select slide 1 in the slide navigator and set its transition to 'Cube' (open the Animate inspector > Add Effect > Cube). Save. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'keynote set_transition ~/Desktop/kinbench/332-deck.key 1 Cube'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/332-transition-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
